field.label: Append Reservations Action
field.comment: Determines how indexing responds to stock reservations being placed, such as during the checkout process. Changing this option may improve performance at times of high traffic, but may cause stock changes to be missed during indexing
field.tooltip:
Calculate Requires Update : Calculates current stock status for products and defers determination of whether to mark for an indexing update
Mark All For Update : Marks all affected products for update in next sync, regardless of whether stock status has changed
No Action : Performs no action and relies on manual update or automated discovery to queue products for sync
